Chronology of every recorded fact about [[The Wanderer]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== House of Blades ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 9''' — The Wanderer arrived in Valinhall by falling into the entry hall with a flash of light and a great roar.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 9''' — The Wanderer was known as Valin among men.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|'''Ch 13''' — The Wanderer forged the Demon Fang Azura.}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 2''' — The Wanderer made the Dragon’s Fangs in the forge.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 2''' — The Wanderer disappeared.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 4''' — The Wanderer has a grave in the House.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 9''' — The Wanderer is the original owner of Mithra.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 14''' — The Wanderer spoke of metaphysical distance and the link between a Territory and its powers.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 17''' — The Valinhall Travelers are set to face the Wanderer once again.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|'''Ch 20''' — Kai is referred to as a Wanderer.}}

== City of Light ==
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 1''' — The Wanderer was once human but became something more.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 5''' — The Wanderer is no longer an Incarnation and serves as a room guardian.}}
* {{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|'''Ch 9''' — The Wanderer once asked Simon what he wants.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
